title: Sarah Chen – Globex Corp
quote: Switching to this platform cut our deployment cycle from two weeks to two days. The developer experience is outstanding, and our marketing team finally has the autonomy they always wanted.

title: Marcus Rivera – Initech
quote: We evaluated five headless CMS platforms. This one won because of its structured content modeling and the speed of its CDN. Our pages load in under 400ms globally.

title: Emily Nakamura – Stark Industries
quote: Our content team publishes across 12 locales without touching code. The workflow approval process gives us confidence that nothing goes live without review.
